message.content:
STEP 1 COMPLETE — Rules locked.
Key constraints: Primary 2-3, Secondary 2-3, Tertiary max 4.
Options: max 10 per spec, under 25 chars.
Banned: Other, Custom, N/A, Unbranded, As Required.
Output: single JSON, no markdown fences.

STEP 2 COMPLETE — Wiki fully read.

Section 9 Demand Signals (ranked):
1. Wash Technology → PRIMARY
2. Throughput → PRIMARY
3. Integrated Dryer → PRIMARY or SECONDARY
4. Control System → SECONDARY
5. Water Recycling → TERTIARY

Section 10 confirms buyers first ask: Total Investment (Price), Wash Technology (Brush vs Brushless), and Site Requirements (Dimensions).

Option values extracted from Section 3:
- Wash Technology: Brush (Soft Touch), Brushless (Touchless), 360-degree Robotic Arm
- Throughput: 5 Cars/hr, 10 Cars/hr, 12 Cars/hr, 15 Cars/hr, 20 Cars/hr
- Integrated Dryer: Yes, No
- Control System: PLC with HMI, Remote Control, Manual
- System Type: Gantry/Roll-Over, Tunnel, Full Setup Package

Price drivers from Section 5: Scope of Supply (Full Setup vs Machine Only), Technology (Brushless vs Brush), Integrated Dryer.

Certifications/use cases from Section 6/7: ISO 9001, Commercial Car Wash, Automobile Dealerships, Fuel Stations.

Brand decision from Section 4: Include. Section 9 and 10 show buyers prioritize brand reputation and service. Tier 1 brands are dominant.

Dimension rule: Applicable. Section 10 and 3.1 emphasize "Required Bay Dimensions" as a critical site requirement for buyers.

STEP 3 COMPLETE.
Primary: Wash Technology, Wash Capacity, Brand | Secondary: System Type, Integrated Dryer, Control System | Tertiary: Required Bay Dimensions, Body Material, Certification

Counts valid? Primary [3/3] Secondary [3/3] Tertiary [3/4]

STEP 4 — Audit...

TIERS
[PASS] Primary = Section 9 top demand signals
[PASS] Secondary = price drivers or technical fit
[PASS] Tertiary = certifications/features/use cases
[PASS] No spec in more than one tier
[PASS] Single-value specs in Tertiary only (ISO 9001)

SPEC NAMES
[PASS] All names from Section 9 or 10 — none invented
[PASS] Title Case, stopwords lowercase, no units in name
[PASS] No duplicates, all 1–3 words

BRAND
[PASS] Section 4 read, dominance checked, tier backed by wiki (Primary)

DIMENSIONS (if applicable)
[PASS] Variable dimension only, rule determined by Section 9/10

OPTIONS
[PASS] Under 25 chars, no vague values, no duplicates
[PASS] Correct symbols (°C, m², m³, –), ordered by buyer frequency
[PASS] Max 10 per spec, reality-checked for Indian B2B

HALLUCINATION
[PASS] Every spec name and option traceable to wiki
[PASS] No values from general knowledge

Overall: [ALL PASS → output]

{
  "category_name": "Automatic Car Washing Machine",
  "finalized_specs": {
    "finalized_primary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Wash Technology",
          "options": [
            "Brush (Soft Touch)",
            "Brushless (Touchless)",
            "360-degree Robotic Arm"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Wash Capacity",
          "options": [
            "Up to 5 Cars/hr",
            "Up to 10 Cars/hr",
            "Up to 12 Cars/hr",
            "Up to 15 Cars/hr",
            "Up to 20 Cars/hr"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Brand",
          "options": [
            "KKE",
            "Nissan Clean India",
            "FourWin",
            "Schumak",
            "KWE",
            "KRE",
            "Inventa Cleantec",
            "MagicWash",
            "WASH MASTER",
            "Wash Champ"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_secondary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "System Type",
          "options": [
            "Gantry (Roll-Over)",
            "Tunnel (Conveyor)",
            "Full Setup Package",
            "Machine Only"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Integrated Dryer",
          "options": [
            "Yes",
            "No"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Control System",
          "options": [
            "PLC with HMI",
            "Web Interface",
            "Remote Control"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_tertiary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Required Bay Dimensions",
          "options": [
            "10m×4.6m×4m",
            "7.5m×3.8m×3.4m",
            "20ft×12ft"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Body Material",
          "options": [
            "Hot-Dip Galvanized Steel",
            "Mild Steel with ACP",
            "Stainless Steel"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Certification",
          "options": [
            "ISO 9001"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
